blocks.text: Glimt stun Sporting 3-0 — Norway's greatest European night
A wild CL night: Madrid crushed City 3-0, PSG demolished Chelsea 5-2, Liverpool fell at Galatasaray. Glimt's demolition of Sporting was the Norwegian sports story of the year.
🏎️ F1 Chinese GP — Mercedes dominant after sprint qualifying, Shanghai race weekend 04:30
